articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Prince Harry sued for defamation by charity he set up in Africa to honor his mother Princess Diana - WTOP
articles.description: Sentebale, a charity co-founded by Prince Harry in Africa to honor his late mother, Princess Diana, has sued for defamation after he stepped down as a patron.
articles.content:
LONDON (AP) A charity co-founded by Prince Harry in Africa to honor his late mother, Princess Diana, has sued him for defamation after he stepped down as a patron last year.
